narrative:
15 Ohio Senate district has 230,950 registered voters, with 63.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 6.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 30.2%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 24.2 percentage points. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +10.8% D−R vs +35.1% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
